characters.name: Christian Stevenson
characters.description: Christian StevensonGender♂ MaleOccupationsDJ (DiRT 2)Commentator (DiRT 2 and DiRT Showdown)PR Manager (DiRT 3)AppearancesDiRT 2DiRT 3DiRT ShowdownChristian Stevensonis a character inColin McRae: DiRT 2,DiRT 3, andDiRT Showdown. Christian has compiled all the soundtracks in the recentDiRTgames. He is also a DJ forKerrang!and has presented numerous extreme-sports TV shows. Christian is the in-game commentator, and he can be heard DJ-ing in the background during menus. He also informs the player of new rewards, prizes, and serve as the tutorial narrator for each race type.

characters.name: Ellie
characters.description: EllieGender♀ FemaleOccupationsTeam ManagerAppearancesDiRT 3PortrayalLucy GriffithsEllieis a character inDiRT 3. She is voiced by Lucy Griffiths. Ellie is the player's in-game team manager. She isveryambitious and her ultimate goal is to see the player make it to the final of theDiRT Tour.

characters.name: Jack
characters.description: JackGender♂ MaleOccupationsMechanicAppearancesDiRT 3PortrayalDaniel LappaineJackis a character inDiRT 3. He is voiced by Daniel Lappaine. Jack is the player's in-game mechanic. He will offer the player with tips on the vehicle setup and talks through each vehicle in theCar Viewer, as well as introducing the player to thelocationsshould they visit them for the first time.
